title: Alcohol use drops among young adults, while cannabis consumption grows: Gallup poll
text: The number of adults age 34 and younger who say they drink alcoholic beverages has dropped during a period of rising cannabis use, according to new survey from Gallup.

title: Tilray is buying beverage brands from Molson Coors, Anheuser-Busch as cannabis industry struggles
text: Tilray Brands, a major cannabis company, is tapping into the beverage industry with recent acquisitions from Molson Coors and Anheuser-Busch.

title: Tilray buys remaining 58% stake in THC beverage company Truss Beverage from Molson Coors
text: Tilray Brands Inc. TLRY, +1.14% said Friday it is buying the remaining 57.5% equity ownership of Truss Beverage Co. from Molson Coors Canada TAP, -0.45% to gain full control of the THC beverage maker, for an undisclosed price. Truss Beverage Co. has been a joint venture between affiliates of Molson Coors Canada and Hexo, which has been acquired by Tilray.

title: Molson Coors Beverage Company Acquires Blue Run Spirits, Further Expanding Its Portfolio Beyond the Beer Aisle
text: CHICAGO & GEORGETOWN, K.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Molson Coors Beverage Company ("MCBC" or "Molson Coors") (NYSE: TAP, TAP.A) has reached an agreement to acquire Blue Run Spirits (“Blue Run”), a visionary and award-winning producer of finely crafted bourbon and rye whiskies. The deal represents another step in Molson Coors' evolution as a total beverage company while providing Blue Run with resources to continue its growth. Based in Georgetown, Kentucky, Blue Run is one of the whiskey industry's mos.

title: Molson Coors Beverage Company (TAP) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 1, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Greg Tierney - Vice President of FP&A, Commercial Finance & Investor Relations Gavin Hattersley - President & Chief Executive Officer Tracey Joubert - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Bonnie Herzog - Goldman Sachs Bill Kirk - Roth MKM Andrea Teixeira - JPMorgan Vivian Azer - TD Cowen Nadine Sarwat - Bernstein Eric Serotta - Morgan Stanley Peter Grom - UBS Lauren Lieberman - Barclays Rob Ottenstein – Evercore Chris Carey - Wells Fargo Securities Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Steve Powers - Deutsche Bank Filippo Falorni - Citi Operator Good day, and welcome to the Molson Coors Beverage Company Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Conference Call. You can find related slides on the Investor Relations page of the Molson Coors website.

title: Molson Coors reports strongest quarterly sales since 2005 merger but revenue miss sees stock fizzle
text: Molson Coors Beverage Company shares fell after its second quarter revenue fell short of expectations, despite the Canadian-American beverage and brewing company reporting its single strongest quarter of sales since the merger of Molson and Coors in 2005. Molson Coors shares fell 5.5% to US$65.90 late morning on Tuesday.

title: Compared to Estimates, Molson Coors (TAP) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: The headline numbers for Molson Coors (TAP) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Molson Coors Brewing (TAP) Beats Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Molson Coors Brewing (TAP) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.78 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.63 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.19 per share a year ago.

title: Molson Coors' stock dips after beer company's sales fall short of estimates
text: Molson Coors Beverage Co.'s stock TAP, -1.11% fell premarket after the beer company had better-than-expected profit for the second quarter but sales that fell slightly short of consensus. The company posted net income of $342.4 million, or $1.57 a share, for the quarter, up from $47.3 million, or 22 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Molson Coors Beverage Company Reports 2023 Second Quarter Results
